title: Authentication Assurance Standard
description: New Zealand government standard defining controls to ensure authenticators remain possessed and solely controlled by authorized holders. Establishes requirements for authentication risk assessment, authenticator holder behavior, binding consistency, and authenticator strength across four assurance levels.

source.page_title: Authentication Assurance Standard | NZ Digital government
